title: hieracium ravidum var. osiliae
intro: Hieracium ravidum var. osiliae, also known as the Rough Hawkweed, is a variety of flowering plant in the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Hieracium ravidum var. osiliae are often dried and made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for topical application.
